video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf-shaped brooch, steadies a dented shield on a workbench. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes with a satchel of vials, carefully guides a safe repair tool over the metal. Cooperative hands, warm forge light, cinematic lighting, no sparks hitting skin, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and character positions. Yuna Starling taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Moonvale continues to hold the shield steady. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: Ensured non-sexual, cooperative interaction with no hazardous elements like sparks or text overlays. Maintained character appearance and setting consistency across both segments.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is experiencing a gear backlog following the goblin raid; the ranger and healer are collaborating to clear the final repairs.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Shared effort in clearing forge backlog.
